steps.title: Setting up
steps.instruction: Setting up

steps.title: Animals are fasted ~ 14:00:00 16:00:00...
steps.instruction: Animals are fasted ~ 14:00:00 16:00:00 ( Overnight ), water should be provided.
.Prepare labelsfor tissue collection tubes/vials. All nesessary files are in “Barcoding package” folder.

steps.title: Take the rats which are going...
steps.instruction: Take the rats which are going to be processed this day and scan their RFIDs to prepare the file for tissue collection.

steps.title: Read the RFIDs into RFID worksheet...
steps.instruction: Read the RFIDs into RFID worksheet (the yellow area) of the barcodes-text-ratGWAS.xlsx . (No inputting of a #-sign or ‘ necessary, the sheet is formatted as text and will automatically interpret everything as text). The program will enter five identical barcodes to the each row on the next sheet named “Barcodes for printing”. Five identical barcodes are printed in each row.

steps.title: Print labels with barcode and RFID...
steps.instruction: Print labels with barcode and RFID number using the Barcodes for printing worksheet and the Printing Cryo Babies.docx instructions. Print each sheet 6 times to get the 30 identical barcoded labels you need.

steps.title: Label freezer boxes (2”, 3”, or...
steps.instruction: Label freezer boxes (2”, 3”, or 5” high) with the Center (MI, TN, NY), type of tissue, the box number, and the date (e.g.TN-Batch 08 Feb-17).

steps.title: Prepare containers for tissue collection
steps.instruction: Prepare containers for tissue collection.

steps.title: Prepare abucket with dry ice with...
steps.instruction: Prepare abucket with dry ice with a glass beaker filled with isopenten for flash-freezing tissue.

steps.title: Have a computer ready for data entry
steps.instruction: Have a computer ready for data entry. Create a new file for each batch using a template RatSampleCollection_BatchNN_MI_DDMonYYYY_Template_v3, e.g. RatSampleCollection_Batch02_MI_04Jun2015.xlsx , for data entry. When collecting tissues from a rat, read the rat’s RFID again (keep cursor on the yellow cell B2 on the worksheet “Check numbers”). Then read the barcodes on the tubes to check whether they are readable and match (cursor position B3, B4...), the program gives a warning if the numbers don’t match.

steps.title: Glucose Measurement
steps.instruction: Glucose Measurement

steps.title: Put a test strip in the...
steps.instruction: Put a test strip in the glucose meter (man by Contour NEXT)

steps.title: Test the meter using the control...
steps.instruction: Test the meter using the control solution; make sure the reading is within the range (ranges listed on the bottom of the strip box).

steps.title: Put a test strip in the glucose meter
steps.instruction: Put a test strip in the glucose meter.

steps.title: Restrain the rat
steps.instruction: Restrain the rat. Cut off ~1mm of the tip of the rat’s tail. Gently milk/stroke the rat’s tail from the base near the butt to the tip of the tail. Discard the first drop of blood.

steps.title: Place a drop of blood on the glucose strip
steps.instruction: Place a drop of blood on the glucose strip. Record the reading.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: if glucose measurement is collected at a different time than sacrifice, create a new row in the RatSampleCollection...xlsx spreadsheet, record the data into columns A through H, and copy “NA” into every other cell of that row.

steps.title: Take the weight in grams, at a 0
steps.instruction: Take the weight in grams, at a 0.1 g precision.

steps.title: Fecal pellet collection
steps.instruction: Fecal pellet collection

steps.title: Place animal securely on the researcher’s arm
steps.instruction: Place animal securely on the researcher’s arm. Assess if there are pellets in the rectum by gently feeling the rectal canal (externally, gently pinch the anus between index finger and thumb and massage gently back 1-2cm from the anus). If pellets are present, they will feel like small solid masses (1cm in length).

steps.title: The pellet is gently pushed towards...
steps.instruction: The pellet is gently pushed towards the anus, and immediately placed in the sterile tube, by holding the tube in position immediate to the anus.

steps.title: The pellets are snap frozen on...
steps.instruction: The pellets are snap frozen on dry ice and stored at -80 °C for later processing. This procedure should be performed as rapidly as possible to ensure integrity of the microbiota.

steps.title: If pellets are not present, repeat...
steps.instruction: If pellets are not present, repeat pellet extraction in a few minutes. If still no pellet, do not collect it and proceed to anesthesia.

steps.title: Isoflurane Anesthesia
steps.instruction: Isoflurane Anesthesia

steps.title: Turn oxygen on to about 1L / minute
steps.instruction: Turn oxygen on to about 1L / minute.

steps.title: Place rat in induction chamber that...
steps.instruction: Place rat in induction chamber that has oxygen and isoflurane lines attached to it.

steps.title: Turn on the isoflurane at about 5%
steps.instruction: Turn on the isoflurane at about 5%.

steps.title: Wait a few minutes until the...
steps.instruction: Wait a few minutes until the rat is lying down and eyes are slightly shut.

steps.title: Take cover off container and pinch...
steps.instruction: Take cover off container and pinch the toes to ensure surgical plane of anesthesia.If rat reacts, put it back in the chamber for a little bit longer.If no reaction, take the rat out.

steps.title: Length tape the ruler to the...
steps.instruction: Length tape the ruler to the table so it doesn’t move around.

steps.title: Head to butt -Measure in cm...
steps.instruction: Head to butt -Measure in cm the length from tip of the nose to the end of the butt (0.1cm precision).

steps.title: Head to tail -Measure in cm...
steps.instruction: Head to tail -Measure in cm the length from tip of the nose to the end of the tail. (0.1 cm precision)

steps.title: Blood Collection via Cardiac Puncture
steps.instruction: Blood Collection via Cardiac Puncture

steps.title: Cutting open
steps.instruction: Cutting open

steps.title: Place the rat on its back on the table
steps.instruction: Place the rat on its back on the table.

steps.title: Place the isoflurane nose cone on the rat
steps.instruction: Place the isoflurane nose cone on the rat

steps.title: Spray fur with 70 % (v/v) EtOH
steps.instruction: Spray fur with 70 % (v/v) EtOH

steps.title: Using a forceps, grab a section...
steps.instruction: Using a forceps, grab a section of skin right above the abdominal cavity, and pull itup towards you while making a “Y” incision in the rat. Remove extra skin to expose the peritoneal cavity

steps.title: Blood Collection
steps.instruction: Blood Collection

steps.title: Open up a new needle and 5 mL syringe
steps.instruction: Open up a new needle and 5 mL syringe.

steps.title: Holding sternum with forceps,cut through the diaphragm with scissors
steps.instruction: Holding sternum with forceps,cut through the diaphragm with scissors.

steps.title: Insert the needle into the tip...
steps.instruction: Insert the needle into the tip of the heart and draw up blood. Move the needle around to find a good position.

steps.title: Inject blood into the serum separation tube
steps.instruction: Inject blood into the serum separation tube.

steps.title: Keep collecting until collect ~5mlCap the...
steps.instruction: Keep collecting until collect ~5mlCap the blood tube, invert 5 times, and place on ice until centrifugation.

steps.title: Trunk Blood Collection
steps.instruction: Trunk Blood Collection

steps.title: Uncap a serum separation tube, put...
steps.instruction: Uncap a serum separation tube, put it on wet ice, and insert a funnel

steps.title: Put rat into holder and into...
steps.instruction: Put rat into holder and into guillotine, decapitate animal over funnel

steps.title: Hold animal over funnel, head side down
steps.instruction: Hold animal over funnel, head side down. Collect all trunk blood coming out of the animal

steps.title: Take out funnel and recap tube
steps.instruction: Take out funnel and recap tube. Invert tube 5 times and put back on ice until tissue harvest is done. -

steps.title: Brain
steps.instruction: Brain

steps.title: Cut off the head and hand...
steps.instruction: Cut off the head and hand over to the second person to perform a brain dissection. Record the time at the start of brain dissection.

steps.title: If only one person is collecting...
steps.instruction: If only one person is collecting the tissues and the brain, put the head on ice and dissect the brain after the liver tissue is frozen.

steps.title: Open the skull and remove the whole brain
steps.instruction: Open the skull and remove the whole brain. Submerge it in the bucket of isopenten coooled in the container with dry ice (~ -30 °C ). When tissue is completely frozen (~ 00:00:30 ), gently wrap it in aluminum foil and transfer into the ½ oz jar and keep on dry ice.

steps.title: Liver
steps.instruction: Liver

steps.title: Grab the top left liver lobe...
steps.instruction: Grab the top left liver lobe (left median lobe) with the forceps.

steps.title: Pull the lobe up and cut...
steps.instruction: Pull the lobe up and cut it out being careful not to cut the large vein/artery that runs towards the back.

steps.title: Place a labeled ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place a labeled ½ oz. jar on the scale and tare.

steps.title: Place the liver lobe in the jar
steps.instruction: Place the liver lobe in the jar.Weigh (to 1mg), record the weight, cap the container and place it on dry ice.

steps.title: Likewise, excise the right median liver lobe
steps.instruction: Likewise, excise the right median liver lobe.

steps.title: Place a labeled ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place a labeled ½ oz. jar on the scale and tare; Place liver lobe into vial, weigh (to 1mg), record weight, and place jar on dry ice

steps.title: Retroperitoneal Fat
steps.instruction: Retroperitoneal Fat

steps.title: Move intestines/organs out of the way...
steps.instruction: Move intestines/organs out of the way and locate the left kidney.

steps.title: Grab the kidney with your finger...
steps.instruction: Grab the kidney with your finger and pull away the fat that is attached to it.

steps.title: Once kidney is disconnected, let go...
steps.instruction: Once kidney is disconnected, let go of the kidney and continue cutting/removing the fat from the cavity.

steps.title: As you move closer to the...
steps.instruction: As you move closer to the testicles, you will see a faint “line” of fat.This is a landmark to determine where the fat pad ends.

steps.title: Cut along that line and remove...
steps.instruction: Cut along that line and remove the fat out of the rat

steps.title: Place a labeled 1/2oz
steps.instruction: Place a labeled 1/2oz. jar on the scale and tare;

steps.title: -dd the fat to the jar
steps.instruction: -dd the fat to the jar

steps.title: Move the intestine/organs out of the...
steps.instruction: Move the intestine/organs out of the way and locate the right kidney.

steps.title: Repeat the procedure above and remove...
steps.instruction: Repeat the procedure above and remove the peritoneal fat on the right side.

steps.title: Place the right side fat in...
steps.instruction: Place the right side fat in the same container that contains the left side fat, weigh in grams (to 1 mg).

steps.title: Record the weight, cap the container...
steps.instruction: Record the weight, cap the container and place it in dry ice

steps.title: Epididymis Fat (Male Rats)
steps.instruction: Epididymis Fat (Male Rats)

steps.title: Pull both testicles out of the body cavity
steps.instruction: Pull both testicles out of the body cavity.

steps.title: Take one testicle and look for...
steps.instruction: Take one testicle and look for the epididymis (curved area directly above the testicle)

steps.title: Hold the fat in one hand...
steps.instruction: Hold the fat in one hand and carefully cut the fat away from the epididymis with scissors

steps.title: Place a labeled ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place a labeled ½ oz. plastic jar on the scale and tare; add the fat to the container.

steps.title: Remove the epididymis fat from the other testicle
steps.instruction: Remove the epididymis fat from the other testicle.

steps.title: Add the new piece of epididymis...
steps.instruction: Add the new piece of epididymis fat in the same container with the first piece.

steps.title: Record the weight in grams (to...
steps.instruction: Record the weight in grams (to 1 mg), cap the container and place it on dry ice.

steps.title: Parametrial Fat (Female Rats)
steps.instruction: Parametrial Fat (Female Rats)

steps.title: Locate the two ovaries which are...
steps.instruction: Locate the two ovaries which are on top of the uterine horns.

steps.title: While holding the ovary on the...
steps.instruction: While holding the ovary on the left side, cut the parametrial fat away from the kidney.The fat should only be attached to the uterine horn now.

steps.title: Continue to hold the ovary and...
steps.instruction: Continue to hold the ovary and trim the fat away from the uterine horn.Be sure to cut around the ovary.

steps.title: Place the storage container on the sale and tare it;
steps.instruction: Place the storage container on the sale and tare it;

steps.title: Place the left parametral fat in the container
steps.instruction: Place the left parametral fat in the container.

steps.title: Repeat the above steps for the right parametral fat
steps.instruction: Repeat the above steps for the right parametral fat.

steps.title: With both fat pads in the...
steps.instruction: With both fat pads in the storage container, record the weight in grams (to 1 mg).

steps.title: Cap the container and place on dry ice
steps.instruction: Cap the container and place on dry ice.

steps.title: Heart
steps.instruction: Heart

steps.title: Cut though the diaphragm with scissors (if no cardiac puncture)
steps.instruction: Cut though the diaphragm with scissors (if no cardiac puncture).

steps.title: Carefully grab the heart with forceps
steps.instruction: Carefully grab the heart with forceps.

steps.title: Cut the heart off by holding...
steps.instruction: Cut the heart off by holding the heart with forceps, and cutting the aorta.

steps.title: Blot the heart on bench paper/gauze...
steps.instruction: Blot the heart on bench paper/gauze to get rid of extra blood.

steps.title: Place a labeled ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place a labeled ½ oz. plastic jar on the scale and tare.

steps.title: Place the heart in the jar,...
steps.instruction: Place the heart in the jar, weigh in grams (to 1mg), record the weight.

steps.title: Cap the container and place it on dry ice
steps.instruction: Cap the container and place it on dry ice

steps.title: Left Kidney
steps.instruction: Left Kidney

steps.title: Move intestines/organs to locate the left kidney
steps.instruction: Move intestines/organs to locate the left kidney.

steps.title: Grab kidney with forceps
steps.instruction: Grab kidney with forceps.

steps.title: Pull up towards yourself and cut...
steps.instruction: Pull up towards yourself and cut the renal artery, vein, and urethra away from the kidney.

steps.title: Remove any extra fat that may...
steps.instruction: Remove any extra fat that may be attached to the kidney

steps.title: Place a labeled ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place a labeled ½ oz. jar on the scale and tare.

steps.title: Place the kidney in the jar
steps.instruction: Place the kidney in the jar.

steps.title: Weigh in grams, record the weight,...
steps.instruction: Weigh in grams, record the weight, cap the container and place on dry ice.

steps.title: Right Kidney
steps.instruction: Right Kidney

steps.title: Dissect out the right kidney the...
steps.instruction: Dissect out the right kidney the same way the left kidney was dissected out.

steps.title: Place a covered and labeled container...
steps.instruction: Place a covered and labeled container with 10 % (v/v) ZBF Zinc formalin on the scale and tare (contains come pre-filled).

steps.title: Remove the cover of the container,...
steps.instruction: Remove the cover of the container, add the kidney to the container, cap the container, weigh it, and record the weight in grams.

steps.title: Dissect out the right kidney the...
steps.instruction: Dissect out the right kidney the same way the left kidney was dissected out.

steps.title: Place a covered and labeled container...
steps.instruction: Place a covered and labeled container with 10% ZBF Zinc formalin on the scale and tare (containes come pre-filled).

steps.title: Remove the cover of the container,...
steps.instruction: Remove the cover of the container, add the kidney to the container, cap the container, weigh it, and record the weight in grams.

steps.title: Cecum
steps.instruction: Cecum

steps.title: Identify cecum in abdominal cavity
steps.instruction: Identify cecum in abdominal cavity. The cecum is found where the small and large intestines meet. It appears as a “dead end” structure.

steps.title: Remove cecum by cutting immediately at...
steps.instruction: Remove cecum by cutting immediately at the entrance of the small intestine to caecum and immediately below the exit of the caecum to large intestine.

steps.title: Place isolated caecum and its contents...
steps.instruction: Place isolated caecum and its contents into a sterile collection 50 ml tube.

steps.title: -Place container on dry ice and...
steps.instruction: -Place container on dry ice and store at -80 °C for.

steps.title: This procedure should be performed as...
steps.instruction: This procedure should be performed as rapidly as possible to ensure integrity of the cecal contents.

steps.title: Right soleus
steps.instruction: Right soleus

steps.title: Grab the rat’s right foot
steps.instruction: Grab the rat’s right foot.

steps.title: Carefully cut a circle around the...
steps.instruction: Carefully cut a circle around the ankle being extra careful to only cut the skin and not any tendons underneath, using scissors.

steps.title: Remove the skin of the leg...
steps.instruction: Remove the skin of the leg by grabbing a piece of the skin near the circle you just cut with forceps and pulling up towards the knee.

steps.title: Take a thin tipped forceps and...
steps.instruction: Take a thin tipped forceps and poke a hole in the space between the Achilles tendon and connecting tissue.

steps.title: Look at the rat’s lower leg;...
steps.instruction: Look at the rat’s lower leg; you’ll see a white line running the length of the gastrocnemius muscle.

steps.title: Place thin tipped forceps in the...
steps.instruction: Place thin tipped forceps in the hole you just made by the Achilles tendon, and remove the outer covering of the gastrocnemius by pulling up along the white line.

steps.title: Directly below that white line is the soleus
steps.instruction: Directly below that white line is the soleus. It appears as a brighter red color than the gastrocnemius and has tendons that attach to the area of the Achilles tendon and to the knee.

steps.title: Use the thin tipped forceps and...
steps.instruction: Use the thin tipped forceps and pull forward the soleus by using the forceps as a spoon

steps.title: Find the end of the soleus...
steps.instruction: Find the end of the soleus tendon that attaches near the Achilles tendon.

steps.title: Place a hemostat on the tendon
steps.instruction: Place a hemostat on the tendon. Make sure it’s on the tendon and not the muscle!

steps.title: Using small scissors, cut the tendon...
steps.instruction: Using small scissors, cut the tendon to release the muscle from the leg.

steps.title: Leaving the hemostat connected, pull the...
steps.instruction: Leaving the hemostat connected, pull the hemostat up towards you to reveal the location of where the soleus is connected by the knee.

steps.title: Cut the tendon connected to the...
steps.instruction: Cut the tendon connected to the soleus to completely remove the soleus from the leg.

steps.title: Remove the hemostat
steps.instruction: Remove the hemostat

steps.title: Place the soleus in a labeled ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place the soleus in a labeled ½ oz. jar and place on dry ice, there is no need to weigh it.

steps.title: Spleen
steps.instruction: Spleen

steps.title: Return to the spleen
steps.instruction: Return to the spleen.

steps.title: Remove spleen and place into 2 ml tube containing 0
steps.instruction: Remove spleen and place into 2 ml tube containing 0.5 ml saline.

steps.title: Locate the RFID tag in the...
steps.instruction: Locate the RFID tag in the rat (it may have moved from its original subcutaneous location).

steps.title: Place the RFID tag into the ½ oz
steps.instruction: Place the RFID tag into the ½ oz. jar along with the spleen.

steps.title: Place tube on dry ice
steps.instruction: Place tube on dry ice.

steps.title: Baculum
steps.instruction: Baculum

steps.title: With your thumbs, push into the...
steps.instruction: With your thumbs, push into the abdomen on either side of the penisuntil the penis pokes out, grab the penis with forceps, pull it out some more, cut off with scissors at the base.

steps.title: Put directly in the labeled 2 mL tube and freeze
steps.instruction: Put directly in the labeled 2 mL tube and freeze.

steps.title: Right eye
steps.instruction: Right eye

steps.title: Use scissors to make incisions at...
steps.instruction: Use scissors to make incisions at lateral and medial canthi at the right eye.

steps.title: Insert forceps with curved tips (Dumont...
steps.instruction: Insert forceps with curved tips (Dumont #5, angled) under eye being careful not to puncture eye.

steps.title: Gently pull up on tightly closed...
steps.instruction: Gently pull up on tightly closed forceps to stretch extraocular muscles. Be careful not to pinch or crush eye.

steps.title: Gently pull until eye is pulled from socket
steps.instruction: Gently pull until eye is pulled from socket.

steps.title: Eye should be spherical and have optic nerve attached
steps.instruction: Eye should be spherical and have optic nerve attached.

steps.title: If dissection is unsuccessful, dissect the...
steps.instruction: If dissection is unsuccessful, dissect the left eye, make a note in the file.

steps.title: Put 1 mL of Karnovsky’s fix...
steps.instruction: Put 1 mL of Karnovsky’s fix in labeled 7 mL vial.

steps.title: Put eye into the vial
steps.instruction: Put eye into the vial.

steps.title: Store at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Store at 4 °C .

steps.title: Ship on wet ice
steps.instruction: Ship on wet ice.

steps.title: Hindlimb
steps.instruction: Hindlimb

steps.title: -Put rat in the prone position,...
steps.instruction: -Put rat in the prone position, head facing away from you,

steps.title: Retract left leg (left leg works...
steps.instruction: Retract left leg (left leg works better for the right handed person) away from the body and approach with the scissors from the back of the thigh. Cut through the skin and soft tissues (muscle) as close to the body as possible. Aim to locate the femur, but don’t cut it. Instead, move the tip of the scissors along the femur in the direction of the hip joint ). You will be able to find the capsule of the hip joint if you go ~1/8 of an inch from the proximal tip of the shaft of the femur towards the tail (if you think of your forearm as a shaft of the femur, the neck of the femur sticks out as a thumb of your left hand when its palm faces down). It will be easier to spot the joint if you keep moving that hip with your left hand.

steps.title: Cut through the capsule of the...
steps.instruction: Cut through the capsule of the joint with the tips of the scissors and that will release the head of the femur.

steps.title: Cut through the soft tissues and...
steps.instruction: Cut through the soft tissues and the skin in the front of the thigh.

steps.title: Put the entire leg into barcoded...
steps.instruction: Put the entire leg into barcoded 50 mL tube and put it on dry ice.

steps.title: Transfer it to a -80 °C freezer
steps.instruction: Transfer it to a -80 °C freezer.

steps.title: Rest of carcass
steps.instruction: Rest of carcass

steps.title: Remove the whole digestive tract and...
steps.instruction: Remove the whole digestive tract and any other remaining internal organs

steps.title: Remove remainder of tail (3/4 inch...
steps.instruction: Remove remainder of tail (3/4 inch of tail was collected earlier) and discard.

steps.title: Remove remainder of head and discard...
steps.instruction: Remove remainder of head and discard (if head has not been removed previously).

steps.title: Affix a barcode label inside of...
steps.instruction: Affix a barcode label inside of a Ziploc bag (sandwich or quart size, as available) and affix a second label on the outside.

steps.title: Place carcass into Ziploc bag and freeze at -20 °C
steps.instruction: Place carcass into Ziploc bag and freeze at -20 °C .

steps.title: bloodtubes
steps.instruction: bloodtubes

steps.title: Centrifuge blood whithn 1 hour after collection
steps.instruction: Centrifuge blood whithn 1 hour after collection. If dissection takes 15 min, blood can be processed in butches of 4.

steps.title: Put the serum separation tube intoa 50 ml conical tube
steps.instruction: Put the serum separation tube intoa 50 ml conical tube. Put into4 degree centrifuge and spin at 3,000 rpm for 18 minutes

steps.title: This step can be adjusted
steps.instruction: This step can be adjusted: depending on centrifuge you can spin the original SST tube; you can spin longer at lower speed.

steps.title: Once finished spinning, the beige colored...
steps.instruction: Once finished spinning, the beige colored “plug” in the blood tube will separated out the serum from the red blood cells.If the plug hasn’t moved yet, spin again for a few minutes.

steps.title: Place microcentrifuge tubes in labeled boxes...
steps.instruction: Place microcentrifuge tubes in labeled boxes and freeze at -80 °C .
